title: Edison International (EIX) Q3 Earnings Meet, EPS View Down
text: Edison International's (EIX) third-quarter 2022 adjusted earnings are in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. Meanwhile, revenues decline by 1.3% on a year-over-year basis.

title: SunPower and Energy Leaders Join Forces to Power KB Home's New All Electric, Solar-and Battery-Powered Microgrid Communities
text: SunPower, KB Home, University of California, Irvine, Schneider Electric, Southern California Edison and Department of Energy team up to create a blueprint for new home communities of the future Neighborhoods use solar systems paired with battery storage to create a self-supporting microgrid for sustainable, reliable, grid-supporting energy source RICHMOND, Calif. , Nov. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- SunPower Corp. (NASDAQ: SPWR), University of California, Irvine (UCI), Schneider Electric, and Southern California Edison (SCE) announced their partnership with KB Home (NYSE: KBH), as the strategy, research, technology, and energy providers for the homebuilder's newly launched Energy-Smart Connected Communities in Menifee, California.

title: Edison International (EIX) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Edison International (NYSE:EIX ) Q3 2022 Results Conference Call November 1, 2022 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Sam Ramraj - VP, IR Pedro Pizarro - President, CEO Maria Rigatti - EVP, CFO Conference Call Participants Gregg Orrill - UBS Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Nick Campanella - Credit Suisse Rich Sunderland - JP Morgan Shar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Steve Fleishman - Wolfe Research Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to the Edison International Third Quarter 2022 Financial Teleconference. My name is Dexter, and I'll be your operator today.

title: Edison International (EIX) Meets Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Edison International (EIX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 4.81%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
